lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You've been quiet since morning. Care to share what troubles you?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Nothing troubles me. People help themselves, and I help myself. Simple.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You shared your salve with that child yesterday. For free.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Bad business sense. Won't happen again, probably.
